content: Pointer-event drag-scroll on a React overflow container: skip touch (e.pointerType === 'touch') to preserve native mobile scroll; use setPointerCapture for clean mouse drag; intercept click-after-drag via onClickCapture (capture phase stopPropagation) with a wasDragging ref to block child Link navigation.

React hooks must all be declared before any early return null in the same component. Declaring hooks after a conditional return violates rules-of-hooks and causes ESLint errors. Always hoist hooks to the top of the function body and place the null check after the last hook call.
